author: @Cryptic_Triptych
text: So much plastic and plastic and more plastic. Also all the hydrocarbons that have been burned to transport and install these ridiculous bird killers 😢

author: @freeforester1717
text: All that toxic landfill, and for nothing.

replies.author: @AnalystPrime
replies.text: Fiberglass is not toxic, otherwise it would not have been used in stuff like boats, water tanks and all the other things that has been thrown in landfill with no problem. Just like cobalt which is used for oil refining in far larger amount than EV batteries have ever needed it, only people saying it is a problem are working for fossil fuel companies.

replies.author: @freeforester1717
replies.text: @AnalystPrime really, all that PPE worn in the manufacturing process and you claim it to be unnecessary - how funny! 🤣🤡🖐🏻

replies.author: @AnalystPrime
replies.text:
@freeforester1717Ah, yes, the manufacturing which happens years to decades before the boat sinks/is dumped in a landfill/left rotting on some beach. Very funny indeed, did the factory that made your car maybe leave all their waste chemicals in the trunk or where did you get this silly idea?

Speaking of cars, some of them also use fiberglass panels. So by your logic the people driving those cars are poisoned by the material it is made of, not the stuff coming from the exhaust pipe... You should tell that to the oil companies, they would love to have another lie to try deflect responsibility from themselves.

replies.author: @d1ckeyseamus
replies.text: You should keep up, or perhaps do a 10 second internet search before asking dumb-ass "gotcha" questions.

author: @milohobo9186
text: We have a long history of manipulating how trees grow to make use of the shape they take. Do you think it is possible to do something like that with bamboo for windmills?

replies.author: @thegrientsiis
replies.text: The wind is strongest above the treeline. Unfortunately, thats usually where trees stop growing. Could somebody turn living bamboo into windmills, sure. Not commercially viable.
